name: Huma Abedin, HillaryClinton.com
subject: I’m a proud Muslim
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
This is not acceptable rhetoric. | Friend --

Donald Trump is leading in every national poll to be the Republican nominee for president.

And earlier today, he released his latest policy proposal: to ban all Muslims from entering our country.

I'm a proud Muslim -- but you don't have to share my faith to share my disgust.

Trump wants to literally write racism into our law books. His Islamophobia doesn't reflect our nation's values -- it goes far enough to damage our country's reputation and could even threaten our national security.

Unfortunately, Trump is leaning into the kind of fear of progress that very well could help him win the nomination. We have to be ready to stop him.

**Add your name to stand with Hillary and build a stronger, fairer, more inclusive country together:** | [ | [**Add my name**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjQxODMxMjIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwODAwMzIzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjQxODMxMjIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwODAwMzIzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Huma

Huma Abedin
Vice Chair
Hillary for America

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors.
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=30&ms=MjQxODMxMjIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwODAwMzIzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjQxODMxMjIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwODAwMzIzS0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjQxODMxMjIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwODAwMzIzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjQxODMxMjIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwODAwMzIzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjQxODMxMjIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwODAwMzIzS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjQxODMxMjIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwODAwMzIzS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=26&ms=MjQxODMxMjIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwODAwMzIzS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=31&ms=MjQxODMxMjIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwODAwMzIzS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Happy holidays](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjQxODMxMjIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwODAwMzIzS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Donald Trump
body:
I want to say a few things about Donald Trump and specifically about his comments tonight that we should ban all Muslims from coming to the United States, even American Muslims returning home from overseas.
It's fun for the political media to treat Donald Trump like he's the lead character in a soap opera or the star player on a baseball team. But the truth is his language is dangerous, especially as it empowers his supporters to act out against Muslims, Latinos, and African-Americans.
Poll after poll shows that I am the candidate best suited to take on Donald Trump and every other Republican running for president.
Help me show the best of America -- not the worst that Trump exemplifies. Help us win.
[**Donate $3 to our campaign now to condemn Donald Trump's hate and racism.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb26c0/43f17890/4f8f5084/62148738/1412109648/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/donald-trump?refcode=em151207-trump")
The United States is a great nation when we stand together, but we are weak when we allow racism and xenophobia to divide us. So let's send a message that we stand together.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

**[Contribute](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb26c0/43f17890/4f8f5084/62148738/1412109648/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/donald-trump?refcode=em151207-trump")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016

PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb26c0/43f17890/4f8f5084/62148739/1412109648/VEsF/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb26c0/43f17890/4f8f5084/62148726/1412109648/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb26c0/43f17890/4f8f5084/62148727/1412109648/VEsD/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb26c0/43f17890/4f8f5084/62148724/1412109648/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Marco Rubio
subject: You can help!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45274174:JOmEMFLvN:m:1:1349778030:91B517C8ACD0CF11CB7BD013F652B2CF:r)
---
| | | | Peter \- have you seen our ad? It holds significant importance to me because it tells a story -- the story of the sacrifices my father made to make a better life for me, my brother, and my sisters. **He wanted all the doors that closed for him to open for us.** So, Peter, if you haven't yet seen it, please take a moment to watch our ad RIGHT NOW.
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45274173:JOmEMFLvN:m:1:1349778030:91B517C8ACD0CF11CB7BD013F652B2CF:r)
---
| Peter, after you've watched, **[can I count on you to chip in $10, $25, $50, $100, or more to make sure this ad stays on the air?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45274173:JOmEMFLvN:m:1:1349778030:91B517C8ACD0CF11CB7BD013F652B2CF:r)** Here's what your immediate contribution will fund:
* [**$ 25 will allow us to air**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45274173:JOmEMFLvN:m:1:1349778030:91B517C8ACD0CF11CB7BD013F652B2CF:r) this ad in Ames, IA.
* **[$ 50 will play this ad in](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45274173:JOmEMFLvN:m:1:1349778030:91B517C8ACD0CF11CB7BD013F652B2CF:r)** Concord, NH.
* **[$ 100 will allow us to play this ad](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45274173:JOmEMFLvN:m:1:1349778030:91B517C8ACD0CF11CB7BD013F652B2CF:r)** during local nightly news in target areas.
* **[$ 250 will allow us to play this ad](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45274173:JOmEMFLvN:m:1:1349778030:91B517C8ACD0CF11CB7BD013F652B2CF:r)** on televisions across South Carolina.
* [**$ 1,000 will play this ad on FOX**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45274173:JOmEMFLvN:m:1:1349778030:91B517C8ACD0CF11CB7BD013F652B2CF:r) during Megyn Kelly's The Kelly File.

My father's journey is the essence of the American Dream. But we are in danger of being the first Americans in the proud history of this great nation that leave our children worse off than ourselves. **We cannot let that happen!** **We must keep the American Dream alive. We can do that with new leadership and a New American Century.** **If you stand with me and my campaign, I need to know.****[Your instant online contribution will go directly towards covering the costly expenses of television advertising and ensuring our ad is able to stay up and in front of voters!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45274173:JOmEMFLvN:m:1:1349778030:91B517C8ACD0CF11CB7BD013F652B2CF:r)** I am running for President of the United States because I want to look into my children's eyes and let them know that their future in America is going to be bright and safe. I want to be able to ensure that they and their generation are given a better and more prosperous country than what we currently have, just like my parents gave me. But in order to make those dreams a reality, I believe we need a leader who will fight unabashedly for our nation, and never be afraid to put our country and citizens first. Peter be sure to **[watch our ad and chip in right away](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45274173:JOmEMFLvN:m:1:1349778030:91B517C8ACD0CF11CB7BD013F652B2CF:r)** \-- w**e only have 72 hours left before our deadline!** Sincerely, Marco Rubio P.S. **[Your donation today](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45274173:JOmEMFLvN:m:1:1349778030:91B517C8ACD0CF11CB7BD013F652B2CF:r)** will guarantee voters can hear the story of my father's journey. **[I hope I can count on you to chip in today with whatever amount you can afford.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45274173:JOmEMFLvN:m:1:1349778030:91B517C8ACD0CF11CB7BD013F652B2CF:r)** Thank you for your continued support and friendship.
---
| | [**Donate** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45274173:JOmEMFLvN:m:1:1349778030:91B517C8ACD0CF11CB7BD013F652B2CF:r)
---
| | | | Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
---

name: Ben Carson
subject: You'll never read this in the media...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32118302:sYTLfIyNF:m:1:876315805:535CDF37767F26477B1DDA9D6DCBF1C8:r)
---

Peter,

I wanted to give you a bit of news you will likely never see in the biased mainstream media.

There have been lots of polls that show completely different results. But through all of this media spin one thing has remained as consistent as it is unreported.

I am the only Republican candidate to beat Hillary Clinton in the General Election. The latest CNN poll produced headlines about Trump and Clinton. But when the poll looked at the General Election, there was only one Republican beating Hillary. Not just beating her, but I am polling above 50 percent.

I beat her by 21 points among men. I bested her 14 points among Independents. I am getting almost 1 in 5 African-Americans.

We can count on the media being very quiet about this. We stand together to take our message directly to the people.

I am a very blessed man. You are one of my many blessings.

When we started this campaign together we knew that UNITED we could change our government. UNITED we can restore the American Dream.

For eight months we have walked hand in hand. Now we are just eight weeks from the first ballots being cast in Iowa.

[**As a small thank you for standing with us, Candy and I would like to give you the gift of a song Candy recently recorded. Please take a moment to listen right here.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32118302:sYTLfIyNF:m:1:876315805:535CDF37767F26477B1DDA9D6DCBF1C8:r)

**I need you now more than ever.

[Please consider again making a contribution as we head into the final weeks of the campaign. ](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32118302:sYTLfIyNF:m:1:876315805:535CDF37767F26477B1DDA9D6DCBF1C8:r) **

Thank you for standing with me throughout this campaign. Please continue to pray for our country.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

| | |
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32118302:sYTLfIyNF:m:1:876315805:535CDF37767F26477B1DDA9D6DCBF1C8:r) [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32118303:sYTLfIyNF:m:1:876315805:535CDF37767F26477B1DDA9D6DCBF1C8:r)
---
|

name: Chris Christie
subject: we need leadership not lectures
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc
body:
Peter,
President Obama continues to lecture about the world as he wishes it would be, not how it really is. More than ever, our country needs a strong, decisive leader in the White House, not someone to just sit in the Oval Office and lecture the American people.

Inexperience and "new" is what led us to the weakness and indecisiveness we have in the Oval Office today. Let us not make that mistake again. **[Donate $5, $25, $75 to make sure we don't.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45275660:JDIpeFLNl:m:1:1516426255:589891F94D27D3E3EB6642426ACBE21E:r)**

Chris
****

****
****
****

| |

name: Rand Paul
subject: They don't know what they're talking about
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
_" I don't think there's anything more important for Republicans in Congress to do [than restore the NSA mass surveillance program.]" -Chris Christie_ _"I think we need to restore the metadata program, which was part of the Patriot Act. " -Jeb Bush_ _[In favor of restoring the Patriot Act] "[I assume when people pick up my telephone, people are listening to my telephones anyway...](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32124144:si_yUIyLN:m:1:879035888:41DCAC089F17B2456886116B5AD26F2E:r)" -Donald Trump_ _" Americans have been largely kept safe for almost 14 years. A major contributor to this success has been the development and use of counterterrorism tools such as those authorized under FISA and Patriot Act." -Marco Rubio_ **There will always be people like Chris Christie, Marco Rubio, Jeb Bush, and Donald Trump, who are very willing to give up your liberty for a false sense of security.** But I've studied this issue. Anyone who thinks a mass surveillance program that targets our very own citizens keeps us safe is wrong. **Surrendering liberty to the government doesn 't stop terrorists and it doesn't stop attacks.** **There is a big question here: Are we willing to give up all of our privacy, willing to give up the idea that warrants should be individualized and allow data to be collected without anyone's name on the warrant?** I'm not willing to make that sacrifice. [If you stand with me, will you contribute today?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32124145:si_yUIyLN:m:1:879035888:41DCAC089F17B2456886116B5AD26F2E:r) | | [Pitch in $25 TODAY >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32124145:si_yUIyLN:m:1:879035888:41DCAC089F17B2456886116B5AD26F2E:r)
---
[Pitch in $50 TODAY >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32124146:si_yUIyLN:m:1:879035888:41DCAC089F17B2456886116B5AD26F2E:r)
[Pitch in $75 TODAY >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32124147:si_yUIyLN:m:1:879035888:41DCAC089F17B2456886116B5AD26F2E:r)
[Pitch in $100 TODAY>>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32124148:si_yUIyLN:m:1:879035888:41DCAC089F17B2456886116B5AD26F2E:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32124149:si_yUIyLN:m:1:879035888:41DCAC089F17B2456886116B5AD26F2E:r)
What Snowden revealed is we were collecting all of Verizon's records on all Americans. Not that we had suspension or were targeting our research or collection of record, I think it's actually made us less safe because I think the haystack is so large that we're getting lost in the haystack.
**I would like to target the people coming here to attack us.**
People like Rubio and Christie and Bush, they're not even ready to defend the border. We shouldn't have let this woman in from Saudi Arabia or Pakistan.
**But that's how we defend the country.**
**We can't have open borders.** I've been advocating for several years now that students, immigrants, visitors, potential fiancees -- all of them need more scrutiny.
It's not about collecting data on our own citizens. That doesn't help.
The Boston bombing happened while we had the bulk data collection, the Paris tragedy happened while we have it and also in France they have the bulk collection but on steroids. They have a program a thousand times more invasive.
**Is there any limit to how much liberty authoritarians like my opponents are willing to give up?**
They'll come back next week and say "give us more of your freedom, we'll protect you."
**But will it have been worth it if we no longer who we are in the process of defending the country?**
I don't think so.
| [Stand with me today.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32124148:si_yUIyLN:m:1:879035888:41DCAC089F17B2456886116B5AD26F2E:r)
---
In Liberty,
Rand Paul
Paid for by Rand Paul for President
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 16, 2015.
For more information [click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/isi_yUIyLN). [Update your preferences](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osi_yUIyLN)
[Unsubscribe](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osi_yUIyLN) | [Unsubscribe via email](mailto:unsub-30934686148-echo3-9C5CA219E36BB3EC8B6A1A4A104EEB95@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings)

[](http://www.paramountcommunication.com)**
clean_body: " I don't think there's anything more important for Republicans in Congress to do [than restore the NSA mass surveillance program.]" -Chris Christie "I think we need to restore the metadata program, which was part of the Patriot Act. " -Jeb Bush [In favor of restoring the Patriot Act] "" -Donald Trump " Americans have been largely kept safe for almost 14 years. A major contributor to this success has been the development and use of counterterrorism tools such as those authorized under FISA and Patriot Act." -Marco Rubio There will always be people like Chris Christie, Marco Rubio, Jeb Bush, and Donald Trump, who are very willing to give up your liberty for a false sense of security. But I've studied this issue. Anyone who thinks a mass surveillance program that targets our very own citizens keeps us safe is wrong. Surrendering liberty to the government doesn 't stop terrorists and it doesn't stop attacks. There is a big question here: Are we willing to give up all of our privacy, willing to give up the idea that warrants should be individualized and allow data to be collected without anyone's name on the warrant? I'm not willing to make that sacrifice. | | What Snowden revealed is we were collecting all of Verizon's records on all Americans. Not that we had suspension or were targeting our research or collection of record, I think it's actually made us less safe because I think the haystack is so large that we're getting lost in the haystack. I would like to target the people coming here to attack us. People like Rubio and Christie and Bush, they're not even ready to defend the border. We shouldn't have let this woman in from Saudi Arabia or Pakistan. But that's how we defend the country. We can't have open borders. I've been advocating for several years now that students, immigrants, visitors, potential fiancees -- all of them need more scrutiny. It's not about collecting data on our own citizens. That doesn't help. The Boston bombing happened while we had the bulk data collection, the Paris tragedy happened while we have it and also in France they have the bulk collection but on steroids. They have a program a thousand times more invasive. Is there any limit to how much liberty authoritarians like my opponents are willing to give up? They'll come back next week and say "give us more of your freedom, we'll protect you." But will it have been worth it if we no longer who we are in the process of defending the country? I don't think so. | In Liberty, Rand Paul Paid for by Rand Paul for President This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system April 16, 2015. For more information . | mailto:unsub-30934686148-echo3-9C5CA219E36BB3EC8B6A1A4A104EEB95@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings **

name: Mike Mikus
subject: It hinges on us
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---
**_Washington Post_ : "Senate passes Obamacare repeal, Planned Parenthood defunding bill"**
[**It 's time to flip the Senate and win back a Democratic majority.
Chip in $5 NOW to elect Katie >> **](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5453855742836604928/4883611736650809344?refcode=e20151208&refcode2=e20151208nd&amount=5)
Friend --

Last week, Pat Toomey and Republicans in the Senate voted to **repeal Obamacare, strip away Medicaid expansion, and defund Planned Parenthood**. And given that Republicans control the majority of seats in the Senate, there wasn't much we could do to stop them.

In the coming year, Washington Republicans will only intensify their efforts to jeopardize health care for millions of people. That's why flipping the Senate in 2016 is so important, and that's why **so much is hinging on Katie 's race in Pennsylvania**.

[**RIGHT NOW: Rush $5 or whatever you can to elect Katie and flip the Senate blue. There 's too much at stake for us to sit this one out.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5453855742836604928/4883611736650809344?refcode=e20151208&refcode2=e20151208nd&amount=5)

If we elect Katie and defeat Pat Toomey, we can retake the majority of seats in the Senate and end these political stunts. That means that instead of voting dozens of times in a fruitless attempt to repeal a law that has benefited millions of Americans, we can focus our efforts on protecting access to affordable health care, combating climate change, and making college more affordable for our students.

But if we lose, Republicans will continue to strip away our rights and attack our values as they advance their out-of-touch agendas just to gain political points.

**Friend, there are too many families who can 't afford to be on the losing end of that fight.**

[**The pundits agree: Our race is critical to ensuring Democrats take back the Senate in 2016. Chip in $5 right now to elect Katie and defeat Pat Toomey and his GOP friends.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5453855742836604928/4883611736650809344?refcode=e20151208&refcode2=e20151208nd&amount=5)

Thanks for your support,

Mike Mikus
Campaign Manager
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5453855742836604928/4883611736650809344?refcode=e20151208&refcode2=e20151208nd&amount=5)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5453855742836604928/4811554142612881408).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: hey, we've GOT this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Friends,

We have a lot of people counting on the Sunshine State. Floridians are counting on us, Democrats in the Senate are counting on us, and middle class Americans across this nation are counting on us.

But that's okay. I was born and raised here and _I know Florida 's got this._

In case you haven't seen the polls or read about the race in the news, here's what you need to know: **Democrats can take back the Senate if we win Florida.**

That's why we're not taking any chances. Our grassroots network has raised $710,876 since I announced in March. I can't be more grateful. But it would really blow people away if we hit $800K by midnight tonight -- that'll show them that we are strong enough to take on Republicans and the Kochs next November.

[**This is our most IMPORTANT fundraising goal yet. Can you contribute $5 or $10 to the 2016 Readiness Fund right now to guarantee that we 'll hit it? **](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae21ea/738133e4/3bc271f9/7f8370ff/3049248735/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pemdoa?refcode=murphy")

This race isn't going to be easy. A recent poll has me just one point behind my opponent, and groups backed by the Koch brothers and Karl Rove have already launched attack ads against me.

But I'm fighting harder than ever to make sure we get a Democratic majority in the Senate and end this era of dysfunction. We need to make progress on issues that matter to the middle class and stop the Tea Party from calling the shots.

When I was a teenager working on construction sites with my Dad, I learned how important it is to begin with a strong foundation. Right now, we're building a strong foundation for this campaign.

[**Help us reach $800K in our 2016 Readiness Fund on December 8th, so we can build a foundation for a victory in 2016. Let 's take Florida and the Senate back for the Democrats.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae21ea/738133e4/3bc271f9/7f8370ff/3049248735/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pemdoa?refcode=murphy")

Thank you,

Patrick Murphy | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae21ea/738133e4/3bc271f9/7f8370f8/3049248735/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---

Contributions or gifts to Friends of Patrick Murphy are not tax deductible.

All content (C) 2015 Friends of Patrick Murphy, All Rights Reserved

name: Jordyn Rush
subject: They will keep trying
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---
**_The Philadelphia Inquirer_ : Katie's race could "decide control of the Senate"**
[**Let 's turn the Senate blue: Make a $5 donation to Katie right now >> **](https://act.myngp.com/el/-6679393393388290048/-7293558705805590528?refcode=e20151208.2&refcode2=e20151208nd.2&amount=5)
It all hinges on our race, Friend.

Pat Toomey and his extremist Republican friends in the Senate have taken things TOO FAR by voting to repeal Obamacare, strip away Medicaid access from hundreds of thousands of Pennsylvanians, and fully defund Planned Parenthood.

That's why winning back control of the Senate couldn't be more important. **A Senate that continues to be controlled by the GOP will continue to try repealing Obamacare, and friend, hundreds of thousands of Pennsylvanians can 't afford to take that risk.**

[**You can send a strong message to Pat Toomey and Republicans in Washington: Chip in $5 right now to show them that we won 't let them continue to play games with our health care.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-6679393393388290048/-7293558705805590528?refcode=e20151208.2&refcode2=e20151208nd.2&amount=5)

We shouldn't be surprised that Pat Toomey and Republicans are putting partisan stunts ahead of hardworking families -- it's the only thing they know how to do. Now, it's up to us to stop them.

**[Winning a Democratic majority in the Senate could come down to one race and one race only -- ours. Chip in here to make sure we elect Katie and put the Senate back in Democratic control.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-6679393393388290048/-7293558705805590528?refcode=e20151208.2&refcode2=e20151208nd.2&amount=5)**

Jordyn Rush
Deputy Campaign Manager
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-6679393393388290048/-7293558705805590528?refcode=e20151208.2&refcode2=e20151208nd.2&amount=5)

body:
| Friend,

I want to see you at the debate next week.

I'm ready to lay out our plan to defeat radical Islam and the radical left that is allowing ISIS to win. I want you to see it live.

**_Tonight_ is the last chance for you and a friend to win a flight, hotel accommodations, and a pair of tickets to the upcoming presidential debate in Las Vegas!**_

I'll be announcing our winner live on Facebook._

[](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fvegas-debate&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vegas_final&n=1)

clean_body: | Friend, I want to see you at the debate next week. I'm ready to lay out our plan to defeat radical Islam and the radical left that is allowing ISIS to win. I want you to see it live. Tonight is the last chance for you and a friend to win a flight, hotel accommodations, and a pair of tickets to the upcoming presidential debate in Las Vegas! I'll be announcing our winner live on Facebook. Act now, so you can have a chance to watch history live in Las Vegas. See you in Vegas! Rick NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN THIS PROMOTION. No contribution of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances or odds of winning. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. Void where prohibited. All applicable federal, state, and local laws and regulations apply. Please to enter by making a contribution of $20.16. Please to enter without making a contribution. You must complete and submit the online entry form during the contest period. This Promotion begins on Tuesday, December 1, 2015 at 6:00 p.m. Eastern Standard Time and ends on Tuesday, December 8, 2015 at 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time (“Entry Period”). All entries must be received by11:59pm Eastern Standard Time on Tuesday, December 8, 2015. One winner will receive the following Prize: two tickets to the Republican Presidential Primary Debate in Las Vegas, Nevada on December 15, 2015; a $600 travel stipend for travel to Las Vegas, Nevada for the winner and one guest, with an approximate retail value of $600; and hotel accommodations for the winner and a guest, with an approximate retail value of $250. Prize may not be substituted or exchanged and is not redeemable for cash. All federal, state, and local taxes associated with the receipt or use of any prize awarded are the sole responsibility of the winner. The Sponsor of this Promotion is Santorum For President 2016, PO Box 247 Verona, PA 15147. Paid for by Santorum for President 2016 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you, so if you have any thoughts on anything at all, and let us know. We believe that email is one of the best ways to stay in touch with our supporters, but you can from these messages. If you’re not interested in continuing to receive email updates, there are other ways to stay involved. You can follow our campaign on , , or . Thank you so much for everything you’re doing to help us reclaim the American Dream for hardworking families. Santorum for President 2016, PO Box 238, Verona, PA 15147

name: Huma Abedin, HillaryClinton.com
subject: Re: I’m a proud Muslim
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
This is not acceptable rhetoric. |
Friend --

Last night, when I heard Donald Trump's hateful comments about banning Muslims like me from entering the United States, I was shocked, offended and angry. But after I saw the flood of responses from this team -- and across the country -- saying that Trump's comments were absolutely unacceptable, I was overwhelmed with a different emotion:

Love.

**[Today, we're celebrating that response with a limited edition sticker -- I think it's pretty special. Will you chip in $1 to get yours?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjQxOTE4NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwODgyNDMzS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjQxOTE4NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwODgyNDMzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Let's show Donald Trump and his supporters that we won't be torn apart by his hateful rhetoric. We're going to stand with Muslim people around the world -- and we're going to make sure Trump never becomes president.

**Chip in $1 to stand with Hillary, and we’ll ship your sticker for free:**
[ | | [**I want one**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=20&ms=MjQxOTE4NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwODgyNDMzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=20&ms=MjQxOTE4NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwODgyNDMzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Huma

Huma Abedin
Vice Chair
Hillary for America

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors.
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=31&ms=MjQxOTE4NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwODgyNDMzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjQxOTE4NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwODgyNDMzS0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjQxOTE4NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwODgyNDMzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjQxOTE4NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwODgyNDMzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjQxOTE4NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwODgyNDMzS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjQxOTE4NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwODgyNDMzS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=26&ms=MjQxOTE4NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwODgyNDMzS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=32&ms=MjQxOTE4NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwODgyNDMzS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Happy holidays](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjQxOTE4NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwODgyNDMzS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=22&ms=MjQxOTE4NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwODgyNDMzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
